title: Making podman-remote-darwin-docs renames manpages incorrectly
body:
/kind bug


**Description**

Running `make install-podman-remote-%-docs` incorrectly renames `podman-remote.conf.5` manpage into `podman.1` manpage

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

`make  install-podman-remote-darwin-docs`
check `docs/build/remote/podman.1`
see that it is actually displaying podman-remote.conf(5)

**Describe the results you received:**
displaying podman-remote.conf.5

**Describe the results you expected:**

displaying podman.1

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

Probably a renaming issue in remote-docs.sh

**Output of `podman version`:**

Version:      2.0.0-dev
API Version:  1
Go Version:   go1.14.3
Git Commit:   39ad0387ca27097875b02b55c6f71c2f2b8bdd6c
Built:        Thu Jun 11 16:45:49 2020
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64



**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**

mostly affects packaging of remote docs for darwin and windows
